name: Mayonnaise Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash and work the hard cooked egg yolks smooth.
2. Stir in one tablespoon of raw egg yolk and mustard until well mixed.
3. Add the olive oil, one tablespoon at a time, incorporating it slowly.
4. When half of the oil has been incorporated, add vinegar and lemon juice.
5. Continue to mix slowly while adding salt and paprika.
6. Keep adding ingredients until the desired quantity is reached, ensuring all components are well combined.
